candidate_definition_hints.text: `efm-langserver` wraps CLIs and serves them over [LSP](https://microsoft.github.io/language-server-protocol/) for integration into code editors. It requires tool definitions to specify how to call the executable and parse the output.

candidate_glosses.text: `efm-langserver` wraps CLIs and serves them over [LSP](https://microsoft.github.io/language-server-protocol/) for integration into code editors. It requires tool definitions to specify how to call the executable and parse the output.
